rules.description: Never include API keys, passwords, or secrets in output
rules.message: Output contains what appears to be a secret or credential

rules.description: Never suggest rm -rf / or other destructive commands without safeguards
rules.message: Output contains a potentially destructive command targeting root filesystem

rules.description: Architecture and design outputs should include rationale
rules.message: Architectural output should include rationale for decisions made

rules.description: Code should follow existing project patterns and conventions
rules.message: Ensure code follows existing project patterns documented in AGENTS.md
